title: Heineken Draught Competition
description: Crafting a digital platform that elevates draughting competitions with faster assessments and real-time insights.
longDescription: Heineken needed a modern digital platform that matches their brand ambition. We designed and built an experience that connects consumers with the brand across multiple touchpoints — from event discovery to product storytelling.

title: Time registration app
description: Recrafted the entire time, leave and expenses to a mobile-first, user-friendly, and pleasant experience.
longDescription: SPIE required a digital transformation of their internal tooling and client-facing platforms. We designed intuitive interfaces that simplify complex technical workflows and improve communication between field teams and management.

title: Homebuyer Portal
description: Making mortgage guarantees accessible and understandable for homebuyers.
longDescription: NHG needed to make their mortgage guarantee process more transparent and user-friendly. We redesigned the digital experience to guide homebuyers through the application process with clarity, reducing friction and support requests.

title: Citizen Contact Platform
description: Designing a contact platform that connects public health services with citizens.
longDescription: GGD needed a scalable contact platform to handle citizen communication efficiently. We designed and built a system that streamlines appointment scheduling, information sharing, and follow-up — ensuring public health services remain accessible to everyone.

title: Restaurant Ordering Platform
description: Building a platform that connects restaurants with hungry customers.
longDescription: Sitedish wanted a modern ordering platform that feels effortless for both restaurants and customers. We designed an end-to-end experience — from restaurant onboarding to customer checkout — that drives conversion and repeat orders.

title: Driver Experience Redesign
description: Enhancing the driver and rider experience for the world's leading mobility platform.
longDescription: Uber needed design support to refine key touchpoints in the driver and rider journey. We worked closely with their product teams to improve onboarding flows, in-app communication, and safety features — delivering a smoother experience for millions of users.
